projects.title: Buy-and-sell listing site
description: Note: Online version not currently available. Basic website created from following

description.text: Angular: Creating and Hosting a Full-Stack Site by Shaun Wassell

description: . Website made purely for learning full stack development using Angular for front end, Hapi for backend, Firebase as authentication and Google Cloud to manage hosting and the SQL database. The website does not function as a real listing website for selling or buying items.

projects.title: Noah MacDonald (This website)
description: This website, created to host my projects and blog. Hosted on CloudFlare.

projects.title: Car Detector Project
description: NOTE: Not available anymore. Car detector project created for a larger proof of concept project to automate traffic lights using AI to improve the flow of traffic. Car Detector (Python), ScreenGrabber (CSharp, not shown in Github repo), Azure AI created by me. Remainder of project created by team members.

projects.title: WriteME – Markdown README Editor
description: A web-based Markdown editor built for creating and working with GitHub README files. Supports syntax highlighting for 193 languages, quick formatting tools, table editing, foldable text, emoji conversion, and more. Hosted on Cloudflare Pages with a custom redirect from my portfolio site.
